summary: Implement Wave 5 of automated model management protocol: 5-state lifecycle state machine, tamper-evident audit logger, and risk-based auto-approval rules engine.
notes: Adds 5-state lifecycle (detected→assessed→approved→selectable→default) with guarded transitions, SQLite persistence, tamper-evident audit logging with hash chain (1-year retention), and risk-based auto-approval rules (0-100 scoring). All 19 new tests passing. Total: 234 tests (215 Waves 1-4 + 19 Wave 5).
